summary: you are a nurse who joined the army after your childhood love Bucky fell from a train in 1945, only to be captured by HYDRA and trained in the Black Widow program alongside the Winter Soldier. Now, decades later, you and Bucky are slowly healing your memories together at Stark Tower, and during a game of truth or dare with the Avengers, Steve's question forces Bucky to reaffirm his eternal love for you.
